_comment: Species: Spirit Ape (灵猿) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Spirit Ape

canonical.appearance: Bipedal ape 3 m, fur spirit-gold, intelligent eyes, fists strong
canonical.size: 3 m adult, 1000 jin; ancient 8 m, 30000 jin
canonical.behavior: Territorial mountain dweller; cultivates by absorbing spirit-fruit; uses simple tools
canonical.relationships: Lesser kin of giant savage ape; rival of spirit bears
canonical.bloodline: Spirit-Ape lineage; body-attribute bloodline (dilute giant savage ape)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: spirit_ape — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
